text.title: ads-google-campaign-setup Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ads-google-campaign-setup as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Omitting network_settings fields when creating a Search campaign via API.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: API defaults enable Display Network and Search Partners. Agents that do not explicitly set target_content_network=False create campaigns that spend on irrelevant placements.

failure-mode.description: Using country or city name strings in location targeting criteria.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Location targeting only accepts geoTargetConstants/<numeric-id> format. Name strings fail validation with a non-obvious error that does not mention the format requirement.
